title: XOR of numbers in a range

content.problemStatement:
You are given two integers, LLL and RRR. Your task is to calculate the XOR of all numbers in the inclusive range [L,R][L, R][L,R].

Formally, you need to compute:

LâŠ•(L+1)âŠ•(L+2)âŠ•â‹ŻâŠ•RL \oplus (L+1) \oplus (L+2) \oplus \dots \oplus RLâŠ•(L+1)âŠ•(L+2)âŠ•â‹ŻâŠ•R

Function DeclarationFunction NamerangeXORrangeXORrangeXOR â€“ This function computes the XOR of all integers in the range [L,R][L, R][L,R].

Parameters
LLL: An integer representing the starting number of the range.
RRR: An integer representing the ending number of the range.
Return Value
Returns an integer representing the XOR of all numbers from LLL to RRR (inclusive).
Constraints
1â‰¤Tâ‰¤2000001 \leq T \leq 2000001â‰¤Tâ‰¤200000
1â‰¤Lâ‰¤Râ‰¤1091 \leq L \leq R \leq 10^91â‰¤Lâ‰¤Râ‰¤109

Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT â€” the number of test cases.
Each of the next TTT lines contains two space-separated integers, LLL and RRR.


Output Format

For each test case, print a single line containing the XOR of all integers in the range [L,R][L, R][L,R].
